title: containers-common bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4:1-134.0.1]
- Disable zstd:chunked partial pull support
- Updated removed references [Orabug: 33473101] (Alex Burmashev)
- Adjust registries.conf (Nikita Gerasimov)
- remove references to RedHat registry (Nikita Gerasimov)

[4:1-134]
- update vendored components for RHEL9.7
- Related: RHEL-80816

[4:1-133]
- update shortnames and vendored components
- Related: RHEL-80816

[4:1-132]
- update vendored components
- Related: RHEL-80816

[2:1-131]
- fetch TMT podman revdep tests from podman dist-git
- needs at least podman 5.4.0-8.el9
- Related: RHEL-80816

[2:1-130]
- rebuild to preserve upgrade path
- Related: RHEL-80816
full_text:
[4:1-134.0.1]
- Disable zstd:chunked partial pull support
- Updated removed references [Orabug: 33473101] (Alex Burmashev)
- Adjust registries.conf (Nikita Gerasimov)
- remove references to RedHat registry (Nikita Gerasimov)

[4:1-134]
- update vendored components for RHEL9.7
- Related: RHEL-80816

[4:1-133]
- update shortnames and vendored components
- Related: RHEL-80816

[4:1-132]
- update vendored components
- Related: RHEL-80816

[2:1-131]
- fetch TMT podman revdep tests from podman dist-git
- needs at least podman 5.4.0-8.el9
- Related: RHEL-80816

[2:1-130]
- rebuild to preserve upgrade path
- Related: RHEL-80816
